docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $898.00 FILED BY MUSGRAVE, ADAM AS TO DEFENDANT GLASS, EVAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-28-2026 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

NO APPEARANCES MADE, THE COURT DISMISSES THE MATTER WITHOUT PREJUDICE AT 3:50 PM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: BRADEN WOODS; CLERK: N.WEBB. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
